name: mcp-server-ftp
description: MCP server for FTP/SFTP access: list, download, upload, edit, append, rename, and delete files and directories on remote servers.
long_description: Interact with FTP and SFTP servers using natural language. Supports binary-safe file transfers, in-place text edits without re-uploading whole files, appends, renames, directory management, FTPS, SSH key authentication, and AES-256-GCM encrypted credentials with OS keychain support for the encryption key.

ftp_host.title: FTP Host
ftp_host.description: FTP server hostname or IP address

ftp_port.title: Port
ftp_port.description: FTP server port (21 for FTP, 22 for SFTP)

ftp_secure.title: Use FTPS
ftp_secure.description: Use secure FTP (true/false). Ignored when protocol is sftp.

tools.name: list-directory
tools.description: List contents of an FTP directory

remotePath.description: Path of the directory on the FTP server

tools.name: download-file
tools.description: Download a file from the FTP server (binary files returned base64-encoded)

remotePath.description: Path of the file on the FTP server

tools.name: upload-file
tools.description: Upload a file to the FTP server (supports base64 for binary content)

remotePath.description: Destination path on the FTP server

content.description: Content to upload to the file

encoding.description: Encoding of the provided content (default: utf8)

tools.name: edit-file
tools.description: Replace an exact string in a remote text file without re-uploading the whole file

remotePath.description: Path of the file on the FTP server

oldText.description: Exact text to find in the file

replaceAll.description: Replace every occurrence instead of requiring oldText to be unique (default: false)

tools.name: append-file
tools.description: Append content to a file, creating it if missing

remotePath.description: Path of the file on the FTP server

content.description: Content to append to the file

encoding.description: Encoding of the provided content (default: utf8)

tools.name: rename-file
tools.description: Rename or move a file or directory

fromPath.description: Current path of the file or directory

toPath.description: New path for the file or directory

remotePath.description: Path of the directory to create
Path of the file to delete
Path of the directory to delete
